name: Yardi Breeze Property Management API
what_it_does: Yardi Breeze REST API for cloud-based property management platform targeting small-to-mid residential and commercial portfolios. Enables AI agents to manage tenant and lease data retrieval for portfolio administration, handle rent payment tracking and automated collection workflow integration, access maintenance request and work order data for property operations, retrieve unit availability and vacancy management data for leasing, manage owner statement and investor reporting data, handle screening and application management workflow data, access prospect communication and leasing pipeline tracking, retrieve accounting and financial reporting data, manage utility billing and expense tracking for properties, and integrate property management data with accounting and reporting platforms.
use_cases: Tracking rent payments from property management automation agents
Managing maintenance requests from operations automation agents
Monitoring vacancy rates from leasing optimization agents
Generating owner statements from investor reporting agents
not_for: Large enterprise property portfolios requiring full Yardi Voyager complexity
Commercial real estate without SMB residential property management focus
Institutional REIT without small-to-mid property manager target
best_when: A small-to-mid residential property manager using Yardi Breeze wants AI agents to automate rent tracking, maintenance coordination, leasing pipeline management, and owner financial reporting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant PII including financial information and screening data requires FCRA and state landlord-tenant law compliance. Automated late fee assessment and eviction trigger workflows must be jurisdiction-validated. Yardi Breeze is a simpler product vs. Yardi Voyager — complex portfolio workflows may require upgrade to full Yardi platform.

auth.notes: Yardi Breeze uses API key authentication. Separate from Yardi Voyager's more extensive API. Yardi Systems is private company. Santa Barbara, California HQ. Yardi Breeze is cloud-only, simplified version of Yardi Voyager. No webhooks — polling required. Yardi Marketplace for integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription per unit
pricing.notes: Santa Barbara, California. Yardi Systems founded 1984. Private company. Property management software market leader. Yardi Breeze launched 2018 as simplified SMB product. Yardi Voyager for enterprise. 2,000+ employee company. Competes with Buildium and AppFolio for small PM market segment.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; undocumented publicly

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant screening and payment data requires FCRA compliance; automated data processing needs permissible purpose controls
Breeze vs. Voyager API difference — Yardi Breeze has a limited API compared to Yardi Voyager; complex enterprise PM workflows may require Voyager upgrade
No webhooks — Yardi Breeze has no webhooks; all event detection requires polling; rate limits may throttle high-frequency polling
Undocumented rate limits — rate limit documentation is limited; implement conservative polling intervals and exponential backoff
Marketplace integration preference — Yardi prefers Marketplace certified integrations over direct API; verify marketplace certification requirements for your use case
SMB focus limitations — Yardi Breeze is optimized for small-mid portfolios; complex multi-entity and portfolio analytics require full Yardi Voyager
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management SMB. SOC2. API key. US. Tenant and property financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key. US. Tenant and financial data.
